notes: Air-logistics/covert-resupply specialist Unique base — one instance on the map, sited on Plains, no terrain exception. The aerial mirror of Camp Cosy: three of Covert Airfield's four unlocks (Repair Drone, Cargocopter, Kleptocopter) are non-combat (damage 0, empty canTarget); Shadowcopter is the roster's one combat-capable unlock, but its low HP and squad cap of 2 keep it a stand-off harasser rather than a real defender — Barracks and its Rifleman/Shielder line exist so Cloudreach isn't a total pushover garrison-wise, same reasoning as Camp Cosy. Unlike Camp Cosy, Cloudreach keeps the standard Turret + Missile Launcher defense pairing rather than going lighter. Hangar is pre-seeded alongside Covert Airfield rather than left as an optional build: Cargocopter's cargoRequiresBuildingDock means it can't board/unload Infantry without one nearby, and Repair Drone/Kleptocopter/Shadowcopter all benefit from the fuel-free landing option. +50% Oil Rig bonus (resourceModifiers, multiplier 1.5, same shape as Winter Forge's) reflects that its whole roster is the heaviest Fuel-upkeep troop line in the game — the base's economic hook is subsidizing its own aircraft, not raw output for its own sake.
